meanings.definition: an outbuilding with a single story; used for shelter or storage

examples: he shed his image as a pushy boss

meanings.definition: pour out in drops or small quantities or as if in drops or small quantities
examples: God shed His grace on Thee

meanings.definition: cause or allow (a solid substance) to flow or run out or over
examples: spill the beans all over the table

meanings.definition: cast off hair, skin, horn, or feathers
shed at an early stage of development
examples: the caducous calyx of a poppy
